title: One of the world’s most wanted men is arrested, ending years-long hunt
summary_full: Daniel Joseph Kinahan, a fugitive suspected of leading a powerful gang in Ireland, was arrested in Dubai as part of a secret operation by Irish and UAE police.
summary_public: Daniel Joseph Kinahan, a fugitive suspected of leading a powerful gang in Ireland, was arrested in Dubai as part of a secret operation by Irish and UAE police.

IE.label: positive
IE.evidence: powerful gang in Ireland, was arrested in Dubai
